error_signature: Empty entity body is not allowed for create method request
title: LinkedIn API requires RAW body format
symptom: When attempting to post to the LinkedIn API using n8n, a 400 error occurs with the message 'Empty entity body is not allowed for create method request'. This indicates that the request body is not being sent correctly.
applies_when: Sending POST request with JSON body
not_this_if: Request is sent as RAW format
root_cause: The LinkedIn API expects the request body to be sent in RAW format rather than as a JSON object. When n8n sends the body as JSON, it does not meet the API's requirements, resulting in a 400 error.
fix_steps: Change the body format in the HTTP Request node to RAW
Ensure the JSON structure is correctly formatted as a string
agent_instruction: Set the HTTP Request node to send the body as RAW instead of JSON.
